sentences.text: Gaslight me, Whitney, you know what I meant, and it's on your calendar!
And she's in the same time zone as me, so it was odd, like, it's in there right.
Like, I should… I mean, I took responsibility for it.
I said, oh, I should have said Central Time.
Like, and I probably should have said either Eastern Time or Central Time, but I…
Also, they never replied to that either, so… that was just, like, an excuse.
And, like, there's nowhere that's indicating that Allie was ever planning on joining that.
Like, Allie, you need to get on a call with us.
I don't understand why she won't, it's just weird.
starts… gymnastics tonight, and I'm really excited.
horrified, because I'm like, please don't, like, injure yourself.
Wait, what did you just say?
I was gonna say, I almost said, I'm getting stand up again, and then I caught myself.
I was like, stood up, stand up, stood up.
You're just recording us sitting here.
